article_meta.title: President Donald Trump’s mass deportation operation is expected to ramp up in 2026 as newly hired military lawyers-turne

reasoning: Classification (Lean Right) is plausible for the article’s enforcement-focused framing and right-coded lexical choices, but confidence is a bit high given inclusion of critical counterpoints. Reasoning cites some structural choices but also leans on outlet-wide lean and references quoted source content, reducing evidence quality.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Lean Right matches the article’s authorial framing and word choice (e.g., ‘illegal immigrants’) and operational emphasis; critiques are present but secondary.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.82 is somewhat high for a piece that includes notable critical perspectives and some neutral reporting; a mid-0.6–0.75 would be better.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Evidence is partly generic and includes non-article factors (outlet lean) and mentions quoted source language in reasoning; limited direct citation of author’s own prose.
